children.name: Vallicula
children.description: Vallicula — a genus of creeping comb jellies in the family Coeloplanidae.

children.name: Coeloplana astericola
children.description: Coeloplana astericola, the creeping comb jelly, is a species of benthic comb jelly from the tropical western Indo-Pacific region that lives as an episymbiont on starfish such as Echinaster luzonicus.
